NSAI Workshop 2026
Schedule Speakers Venue Register
Schedule Speakers Venue Register

SPIKE Research Group  ·  Imperial College London

Neuro-symbolic

AI Workshop

Date

Friday 13th March 2026

Venue

Location TBC

Host

Imperial College London

A one-day workshop bringing together researchers to explore the intersection of neural and symbolic approaches to AI. The morning features lightning talks from group members, followed by afternoon breakout sessions to discuss potential collaborations and future directions in neuro-symbolic AI.

Programme

Schedule

Morning lightning talks, afternoon breakout sessions

Time Event Speaker Links

Join Us

Registration

The workshop is open to members of the SPIKE research group and invited collaborators. To register your interest, please get in touch.
